text: Being here, I am enveloped by a sense of order and intellectual curiosity. The first scene—a clean, modern meeting space behind glass—evokes a feeling of anticipation, as though ideas wait patiently to be exchanged. In the second image, the vibrant R+D wall and its talk of evolution and coexistence inspires me to reflect on the continuous human pursuit of understanding. I feel both grounded by structure and energized by possibility. My mind drifts between the safety of boundaries and the thrill of innovation.
